{{Quote|Will be back tomorrow. Now mind your manners.|Norky's father|<ref name="bun" />}}
The '''father''' of the [[Youngling/Legends|child]] [[Norky]]<ref name="bun" /> was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[persta]],<ref name="Persta" /> the same [[Species/Legends|species]] as his son. Norky's [[Parent/Legends|father]] lived with their [[Norky's mother|son's mother]] and Norky on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="bun" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="date">{{EwoksDate|the appearance of [[Norky]]'s [[Parent/Legends|father]]|[[Bringing Up Norky]]}}</ref> they accompanied the mother and son to deliver the latter to the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shodu Warrick]] in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], where he would spend the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] and [[Time/Legends|night]] until his parents returned. Before they left, the father reminded Norky that they would be back the next day and to mind his manners. Indeed, the father returned the day after to pick up Norky. They had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|fur]], blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and beige skin, and they wore an article of brown [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] around their neck.<ref name="bun" />

==Behind the scenes==
Norky's father appeared in "[[Bringing Up Norky]],"<ref name="bun" /> the nineteenth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]. The episode was written by [[Bob Carrau]] and [[Earl Kress]], and it premiered on [[November 22]], [[1986]].<ref name="Insider 27">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>
